## Summary

-

## Type Of Change

- [ ] New skill
- [ ] Skill update
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Repository maintenance

## Checklist

- [ ] Content is in English.
- [ ] No secrets, tokens, private project IDs, or customer data are included.
- [ ] Official sources or reproducible evidence are linked where relevant.
- [ ] Version-sensitive behavior is marked.
- [ ] `README.md`, `skills/README.md`, or `CHANGELOG.md` are updated when relevant.
